user.title: HEMM Energy Optimizer
user.description: Set up the HEMM energy optimization hub.

data_description.horizon_hours: How far ahead the optimizer plans (1–72 hours).
data_description.max_iterations: Maximum number of solver iterations per planning cycle.
data_description.solver_backend: Optimization algorithm: central MILP or distributed.

select_device.title: Add Device
select_device.description: Choose device type and configuration tier.

configure_device.title: Configure Device
configure_device.description: Set device parameters. A safe default script is mandatory.

data_description.control_class: How HEMM treats this device: passive (observe only), reactive (setpoint + envelope), planned (full optimization).

errors.safe_default_required: A safe default script is required for every device.

solver_degraded.title: Solver performance degraded
solver_degraded.description: The HEMM solver did not converge within the expected time. This may indicate a configuration issue or excessive device count.

online_id_update.title: Model update available for {device_name}
online_id_update.description: Online identification suggests updated parameters for {device_name}. Review and confirm to apply.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Run the optimizer without applying results.

device_filter.name: Device filter
device_filter.description: Optional list of device IDs to re-optimize. Others keep their current plan.

horizon_hours.name: Horizon hours
horizon_hours.description: Override planning horizon for this simulation.

set_price_curve.name: Set price curve
set_price_curve.description: Manually set electricity prices for the next optimization.

prices.name: Prices
prices.description: List of prices in EUR/kWh per time slot.

set_solver.name: Set solver
set_solver.description: Switch the active solver backend at runtime.

add_constraint_window.name: Add constraint window
add_constraint_window.description: Register a time-bound constraint for a device.

window_id.name: Window ID
window_id.description: Unique identifier for this constraint window.

deadline.name: Deadline
deadline.description: When the constraint must be satisfied.

flex_cost_per_hour_early.name: Flex cost
flex_cost_per_hour_early.description: EUR penalty per hour pulled forward from deadline.

priority_penalty.name: Priority
priority_penalty.description: Priority weight — higher wins in conflicts.

remove_constraint.name: Remove constraint
remove_constraint.description: Remove a constraint window by ID.

window_id.name: Window ID
window_id.description: ID of the constraint window to remove.

bump_priority.name: Bump priority
bump_priority.description: Update the priority penalty of a constraint window.
